records.title: GridCore Manufacturing breaks ground on new power transformer production plant
records.subheadline: Expansion is intended to increase domestic output for utility and grid modernization projects.
records.body_text: GridCore Manufacturing today announced that it has broken ground on a new power transformer production plant in Oklahoma. The facility is expected to increase output for utility customers pursuing grid modernization, substation replacement, and transmission buildout. The company said the new site will add significant annual manufacturing capacity once fully operational.

records.title: VoltAxis Systems invests $180 million in U.S. switchgear and substation equipment campus
records.subheadline: New production lines target utility, substation and large-load interconnection demand.
records.body_text: VoltAxis Systems announced a $180 million investment to build a new U.S. campus for medium-voltage switchgear, substation assemblies and related grid equipment. The company said the project is intended to support utility capital programs, data center interconnection work and transmission upgrades.

records.title: ThermaLoop Systems signs multi-year supply agreement for data center cooling modules
records.subheadline: Agreement supports accelerated shipments for AI infrastructure deployments.
records.body_text: ThermaLoop Systems announced a multi-year supply agreement covering liquid cooling modules and distribution units for large AI data center deployments. The company said the agreement supports a planned production increase at its existing thermal management operations.

records.title: PrimeForge Power to expand generator package factory for data center and utility resilience demand
records.subheadline: Company cites backup power demand from digital infrastructure and utility customers.
records.body_text: PrimeForge Power announced an expansion of its generator package factory to support rising demand from data center operators and utility resilience programs. The company said the project will add new production capacity for backup-power systems, switchboards and related balance-of-system equipment.

records.title: TurbineWorks Energy opens service and assembly hub for gas turbine packages
records.subheadline: New site is intended to shorten delivery cycles for flexible power projects.
records.body_text: TurbineWorks Energy announced the opening of a new U.S. service and light-assembly hub for gas turbine packages and related auxiliary systems. The company said the site is designed to support flexible power projects serving industrial loads and digital infrastructure.

records.title: Lamina Grid Products adds core and coil line to support transformer backlog
records.subheadline: Expansion targets utility and data center transformer demand.
records.body_text: Lamina Grid Products announced a new core and coil manufacturing line intended to support rising transformer backlog and utility procurement activity. The company said the expansion will supply domestic transformer OEMs serving substation, data center and industrial power projects.

records.title: MotionArc Controls enters joint venture for industrial automation systems
records.subheadline: JV will expand product development, assembly and go-to-market efforts.
records.body_text: MotionArc Controls announced a joint venture focused on industrial automation systems. The company said the partnership will support expanded product development, assembly and marketing for factory automation offerings.

records.title: MeterWave Technologies expands smart meter production lines for utility modernization programs
records.subheadline: Project supports grid modernization and utility rollout schedules.
records.body_text: MeterWave Technologies announced an expansion of its smart meter production lines to support utility modernization programs and advanced metering deployments. The company said the project increases output capacity and shortens lead times for utility customers.

records.title: ForgeLine Components selects Tennessee site for advanced industrial manufacturing campus
records.subheadline: Campus will support a range of U.S. industrial and infrastructure end markets.
records.body_text: ForgeLine Components announced the selection of a Tennessee site for an advanced industrial manufacturing campus. The company said the project will support multiple U.S. industrial and infrastructure end markets but did not specify a single demand system.

records.title: RiverState Electric signs first large-load service agreement with hyperscale data center customer
records.subheadline: Agreement is expected to increase connected load and trigger substation upgrades.
records.body_text: RiverState Electric announced its first large-load electric service agreement with a hyperscale data center customer. The utility said the agreement is expected to increase connected load materially and drive new substation and feeder investments.

records.title: ConductorWorks invests in new medium-voltage cable factory for utility and data center projects
records.subheadline: Facility will increase output for grid upgrades and large-load connections.
records.body_text: ConductorWorks announced an investment in a new medium-voltage cable factory designed to support utility grid upgrades, substation work and large-load connection projects. The company said the site will add domestic output capacity as project demand increases.

records.title: MacroFab Holdings announces $600 million U.S. industrial expansion plan
records.subheadline: Capital program spans multiple facilities and business lines.
records.body_text: MacroFab Holdings announced a $600 million U.S. industrial expansion plan spanning multiple facilities and business lines. The company described the move as a broad domestic manufacturing growth initiative without tying it to one specific physical system.
